summary: South Bay startups pulled in nearly $3.5 billion across 24 funding rounds in the past six weeks, with AI dominating: Nexthop AI's $500M Series B and Rhoda AI's $450M Series A highlight the region's strength in machine learning, while semiconductor plays like SiFive ($400M Series G) and Frore Systems ($143M Series D) show hardware isn't dead. Most local tech companies are hiring or holding steady, suggesting cautious optimism heading into spring.
